items.title: 57. Decision Trees: The AI That Plays 20 Questions
items.description:
You've played 20 questions before. You think of something. Someone asks yes/no questions to figure out what it is. Is it alive? Is it bigger than a car? Does it have legs?

Each question narrows down the possibilities until they get to the answer.

items.title: Are you unable to start anything because of overthinking?
items.description:
Have you noticed that before you start anything, 10 questions come to your mind?

“What will happen if I do this?”, “Can I do it?”, “What if I make a mistake?”, “Is this the best way?”

And these questions are the ones that ultimately prevent you from starting.
